itemdesc-walkingstick-sheathed: A sturdy walking aid that holds a sharp secret To assemble, hold the cane sheath in your off-hand and the blade in your main hand, then press F
itemdesc-walkingstick-sheath: Cane sheath that can hide a blade
itemdesc-hidden-blade: Iron blade that can be hidden in a cane sheath
itemdesc-walkingstick-gun-sheathed: An elegant walking aid that holds a deadly secret To assemble, hold the cane holster in your off-hand and the gearlock in your main hand, then press F
itemdesc-walkingstick-gun-sheath: Cane holster that can hide a gearlock
itemdesc-hidden-gun: Gearlock that can be hidden in a cane holster To reload press alt+r, requires paper cartridges and flax fibers on your toolbar
itemdesc-paper-cartridge: Used for loading the hidden gearlock mechanism
itemdesc-paper-cylinder: Used in the crafting of the paper cartridges
itemdesc-flintlock-mechanism-iron: Strange mechanism once commonly used in firearms, needed to craft a hidden gearlock
itemdesc-hiddenblade-head-iron: Slim iron blade head, needed to craft a hidden blade
itemdesc-schematic-flintlock: Schematic needed to craft the gearlock mechanism

game:walkingstick-guide-text: Walking Sticks A trusty companions for your rusty knees. Walking sticks are handheld items that provide passive bonuses while equipped. Every stick improves your walking speed and reduces hunger drain, while some variants come with a unique ability tied to their purpose. All walking sticks feature a custom walk animation and an auto-step feature that helps you traverse uneven terrain without jumping. Variants range from the simple Crude walking stick, easily crafted on the go, to more unique options like the Blackguard spearstaff which can be thrown and provides much needed aid on long marches, or the cozy Witch's variant that casts a warm comforting light which can also be used to light a fire. Speaking of fire, the terrifying Jonas ash-spitter flamethrower fueled by temporal gears is also at your disposal. Some sticks support attachments. For example, the Base walking stick can hold a lantern made of any metal, quartz glass with no lining, or alternatively a cow skull, while the Fine walking stick can be used to craft a Pathfinder's walking stick, Gas lantern variant, a Shepherd's axe, or the Architect's walking stick. Those who wish to remain hidden, or perhaps have a little mischievous intent may be interested in a Cane with hidden blade or a Cane with hidden gearlock. Several sticks can also be attached to the side of your elk. Check each variant's handbook entry for detailed stats and crafting recipes. May the road rise to meet your steps, traveller.
itemdesc-walkingstick-gas: A very bright walking aid that illuminates the path ahead and conserves energy while walking. Hold right click to amplify the lamp's glow
itemdesc-walkingstick-blackguard: Sharp and sturdy, eases the burden of heavy armor on long marches while keeping foes at bay.
itemdesc-walkingstick-forlorn: Fine and reliable, built for the long road and the last line of defense.
itemdesc-walkingstick-jonas: Will melt everything standing before you, also a walking stick.
itemdesc-walkingstick-shepherds: Also known as a ciupaga, valaška, or fokos in the mountainous regions. A combination of walking stick and forestry multitool-sidearm, it helps in clearing brushes ahead and provides protection when needed.
itemdesc-walkingstick-architect: A walking stick that doubles as a measuring device, letting you measure distance between blocks.
itemdesc-walkingstick-pathfinder: A walking stick with an integrated scope, perfect for those who like to see what lies ahead or above.
itemdesc-walkingstick-leap: Also known as a garrote in the Volcanic Isles, it aids in traversing rugged terrain.
itemdesc-walkingstick-blackthorn: Also called a shillelagh in the Emerald Isle. Conserves energy while walking, brutal when swung.
itemdesc-walkingstick-witch: A charming walking aid that casts a warm, comforting light, easing the traveler’s burden with every step. Useful for starting fires.
itemdesc-walkingstick-sling: A combination of a walking stick and a heavy-duty sling for ranged combat. Uses common stones as ammunition.
